title: 全球顶刊《Nature》揭穿职场谎言：妈妈被「时间管理」PUA了？ | 原文
content: Nature magazine debunks the myth that a “well‑managed” life can balance career and motherhood. A 20‑year study by LSE tracking 13,347 Danish PhD scholars shows that even in a welfare state with generous parental leave, careers split at childbirth. The research reveals that motherhood remains a significant professional hurdle rather than simply a manageable role.

content: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mujahedin al‑Harei issued a statement emphasising that Iran seeks no war but will not abandon its rights. title: 微信公众号打击自动化 AI 创作行为
content: WeChat’s public‑platform rules now prohibit “non‑human automated creation.” The new guidelines state that content generated by AI or other automated means without human authorship violates three key red lines. Accounts that post such material will face tiered penalties based on severity. The move signals a return to “content is king,” requiring creators to keep human oversight and emotional input when using tools.

title: 宇树机器人 R1 现身阿里西溪园区，有望合作「树卖通」项目
content: Yu Shu Technology’s newest robot, the R1, was showcased at Alibaba's Xijie Park as part of an impending partnership between the two companies. The robot is prepared for the “Tree Sell-Through” project, which Alibaba plans to announce during a Shenzhen branding conference in mid‑April. Analysts suggest the project links to Alibaba’s AliExpress, where Yu Shu opened a store in March 2025. In January, over 50 brands joined AliExpress’s “Super Brand Overseas Plan,” and the platform is targeting large‑scale overseas expansion and managed logistics by 2026.

title: 恶意诋毁蚂蚁集团，网络大 V 臧其超等被判赔偿 150 万
content: The Zhejiang High Court ruled that several online figures, including influencer Zang Qichao, must pay Ant Group 1.5 million yuan for commercial defamation and unfair competition. The judgment upheld the original verdict, ordering the seven defendants to cease the defamatory practices and jointly compensate Ant Group. Zang, who runs a large MCN with over 500 accounts and 100 million followers, repeatedly attacked Ant Pay. Many of his offending accounts had been permanently banned before the judgment. Ant Pay, part of Alibaba’s ecosystem, began as Alipay in 2004.

title: 老铺黄金挖角空少空姐：年薪最高 45.5 万
content: Lao Pu Golden is recruiting store‑customer service managers with at least six years of airline cabin crew experience and three years as a senior flight attendant. Positions at the Hangzhou and Shanghai locations require a flight‑crew background, offering monthly salaries of 25,000–35,000 yuan. The retailer previously preferred flight‑crew candidates for sales roles, valuing their customer‑friendly demeanor. The company’s high salaries and focus on aviation talent align with a luxury‑service strategy and reflect a shift in gold retail toward premium experiences.

title: Anthropic 完成要约收购 员工愿意出售的股份数量有限
content: Anthropic employees completed an earlier stock sell‑off, but the amount sold was limited, so some investors could not purchase all available shares. The offer was priced at the same valuation as the company’s February Series B round—$350 billion (excluding the newly raised $30 billion). Anthropic did not comment. The total transaction value was not disclosed and was below the $6 billion investors had planned to buy. Several current and former employees plan to hold more shares ahead of Anthropic’s anticipated IPO this year.

content: Milk Tea Ice City has removed its previously launched breakfast series from its ordering app, and stores in the pilot cities of Hangzhou, Xi’an, Dalian, and Nanning have stopped selling the items. title: 加州的储能救了太阳能，坑了自己？ | 原文
content: California’s battery storage is raising midday power prices. A study by Aurora Energy Research shows that during peak solar output, batteries charge en masse, increasing demand and pushing wholesale prices up. On March 20, 2025, CAISO’s dollar‑per‑megawatt‑hour rate rose from a potential –$50 to –$8.34 due to battery activity, a $42 per MWh difference. Thus, storage meant to support solar is inadvertently hurting the market it helps.

content: This article analyzes Warren Buffett’s extensive shareholder letters (1956‑2024) to reveal how he thinks about valuation. Buffett stresses that valuation is fundamental but never explains his full calculation. Early on he used simple balance‑sheet–based estimates, then shifted to predicting normalized earnings of durable businesses. He avoids detailed DCF models, often giving only a final value estimate. Over time he admits valuation is difficult, relies on rough “normalized profit” judgments, and never shares complete formulae.

title: 为什么 RSA 证书在新版 OpenSSH 上认证失败？ russh 库 0.59 协议编码的两层坑
content: I fixed a compatibility bug in the russh 0.59 library that caused RSA SHA‑2 authentication to fail on OpenSSH 8.2+. OpenSSH no longer accepts the legacy ssh‑rsa algorithm, so client‑side key, agent, and certificate authentication must use rsa‑sha2‑256 or rsa‑sha2‑512. The issue was twofold: russh encoded certificates with the old algorithm name and omitted the required prefix in the signature packet. After correcting the algorithm name and signature format, all authentication paths worked, and I tested them against a real OpenSSH server.

title: 在 Token 消耗上， 2 个空格比 4 个空格缩进更省吗？
content: In AI tokenization, a two‑space indentation may be counted as one token, and a four‑space indentation may also be counted as one token. However, as nesting depth increases, the difference grows. For example, at the fourth level, two spaces give 8 blanks (≈2–4 tokens), while four spaces give 16 blanks (≈4–8 tokens). Thus deeper indentation with fewer spaces can reduce token count.

title: GitHub availability report: March 2026
content: GitHub reported four March 2026 incidents that caused service degradations. On March 3, an issue with the user‑settings cache caused up to 40% request failures across many services; a rollback and new isolation of the cache were implemented. March 5 saw Redis load‑balancer misconfigurations that delayed Actions workflows; the changes were reverted and alerting improved. March 19/20 affected Copilot Agent due to a credential error, fixed by rotating credentials and adding monitoring. On March 24, Microsoft Teams integrations suffered from an upstream outage; the issue was resolved when the dependency recovered.

title: 「Claude Code 写前端有多丑？」一个 Markdown 文件夹几天狂揽近2万 Star，把 Apple、Stripe 的审美直接灌进 AI | 原文
content: A new open‑source repository, “awesome-design-md,” has attracted nearly 20,000 stars in a few days. It aggregates design system data from over 31 websites—including Apple, Stripe, and Linear—into Markdown files. By feeding a single Markdown file and a one‑sentence prompt to an AI agent (Claude Code), developers can generate user interfaces that replicate the style of those sites. This approach, inspired by Google Stitch’s DESIGN.md, is reshaping front‑end aesthetics in the AI era.

title: DeepSeek 网页升级，上线「专家模式」；腾讯上线「浏览器龙虾」；传比特币之父「中本聪」真实身份曝光｜极客早知道 | 原文
content: DeepSeek’s web version has been upgraded to include “Fast Mode” and a new “Expert Mode.” Fast Mode offers streamlined searches similar to earlier console versions, while Expert Mode enhances handling of complex, long‑range queries and provides specialized knowledge in areas such as programming, law, and medicine. The upgrade improves accuracy on mathematical problems; for example, Expert Mode correctly assessed that a 7‑meter sugarcane could not pass through a 2‑meter‑wide, 1‑meter‐high door, whereas Fast Mode answered “no.”

title: 深圳救护车截单延误抢救致死，官方通报已处罚，暴露了急救体系的什么漏洞？普通患者遇到这种情况该怎么办？
content: On 5 Aug 2025 an ambulance dispatched from Shenzhen Jianan Hospital transferred a woman, Zhang, to its own hospital instead of the designated district hospital, delaying critical care. An eight‑hour wait culminated in her death from splenic aneurysm rupture. The Shenzhen Health Commission fined Jianan 76,000 CNY and suspended its pre‑hospital emergency services for six months. Families have filed civil suits and are awaiting medical‑damage assessments; authorities are reviewing the region’s emergency‑dispatch protocols.

title: Anthropic的「奥本海默时刻」：最害怕AI的公司，造出了最危险的AI
content: Anthropic released Claude Mythos, its most powerful AI model, but kept it private because it can autonomously discover and exploit zero‑day vulnerabilities in major operating systems, browsers, and software like FFmpeg. The model combines reasoning with targeted testing, enabling it to find long‑hidden bugs that traditional fuzzers miss. Anthropic warns that such capabilities reduce the effort needed to break critical infrastructure, transforming AI from a threat detection tool into a sophisticated attack platform. The company released “Project Glasswing” to provide the model to defenders before broader deployment.

Meta released Muse Spark, a multimodal reasoning model matching top competitors. Anthropic opened Claude Managed Agents, a hosted API for large‑scale agent deployment. Google added Notebooks to Gemini, syncing with NotebookLM. Other updates: PixVerse C1 video model, FLUX.2 Small Decoder, Liquid AI’s LFM2.5‑VL‑450M edge vision‑language model, OpenClaw updates, Colab’s Custom Instructions and Learn Mode, Adobe’s Student Spaces, Tencent Cloud’s QBotClaw browser tool, Google Finance AI expansion, Mercor’s APEX‑Agents benchmark, Mario Zechner joining Earendil, Alibaba’s Tongyi lab restructuring, Musk’s Grok model roadmap, and HappyHorse‑1.0 topping a blind test.

title: 杭州西湖将连续一周撒 7 吨漂白粉，以保障荷花健康生长，会对其他生物产生影响吗？还有哪些好的消杀方式？
content: 4月8日晚上，杭州西湖开始清塘作业，在未来一周，将给湖里撒7吨漂白粉，覆盖150亩24个荷花区。据悉，此举主要目的是‌消毒杀菌、抑制青苔和藻类生长，并减少草食性鱼类对新生荷芽的啃食‌，以保障荷花健康生长，确保今年的荷花可以在7月份顺利盛开。而在清塘时，工作人员会先将荷区拦网抬高，引导大部分鱼类迁移，再从边缘开始投放‌低浓度漂白粉‌，让残留的“漏网之鱼”有逃生通道，尽可能降低对生态的影响 。

title: 最高年入2000万元？AI催生的“一人公司”爆火，人人都可以吗？
content: AI has lowered the capital and skill barriers for solo entrepreneurs, leading to the rise of “one‑person companies” (OPC) where a single founder works with AI “digital employees.” The model relies on cheap, powerful AI tools for coding, design, and content creation, enabling rapid product development and low fixed costs. While annual revenues typically cap at 5–20 million yuan, scaling requires bringing in partners or investors and careful governance. OPCs are likely to dominate knowledge‑intensive, low‑asset sectors, complementing traditional teams rather than replacing them.
